mapper.insert: INSERT INTO adoption_applications (user_id, pet_id, reason, id_card, living_condition, experience, status, created_at, created_by, deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{petId}, #{reason}, #{idCard}, #{livingCondition}, #{experience}, #{status}, NOW(), #{createdBy}, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE adoption_applications
reason = #{reason}, id_card = #{idCard}, living_condition = #{livingCondition}, experience = #{experience}, status = #{status}, review_notes = #{reviewNotes}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM adoption_applications WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM adoption_applications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM adoption_applications WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM adoption_applications WHERE pet_id = #{petId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM adoption_applications WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO adoptions (user_id, pet_id, application_id, status, notes, created_at, created_by, deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{petId}, #{applicationId}, #{status}, #{notes}, NOW(), #{createdBy}, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE adoptions
status = #{status}, notes = #{notes}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM adoptions WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM adoptions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM adoptions WHERE pet_id = #{petId} AND status = 'active' AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pet_videos (adoption_id, user_id, pet_id, video_url, thumbnail_url, description, status, created_at, created_by, deleted) VALUES (#{adoptionId}, #{userId}, #{petId}, #{videoUrl}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{description}, #{status}, NOW(), #{createdBy}, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE pet_videos
description = #{description}, status = #{status}, review_notes = #{reviewNotes}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, next_reminder_date = #{nextReminderDate}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pet_videos WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM pet_videos WHERE adoption_id = #{adoptionId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM pet_videos WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM pet_videos WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
